name: claude-prompt-tools
description: A small collection of Claude skills for getting dramatically better results from any LLM. Starting with prompt-enhancer.

metadata.description: Prompt engineering skills for Claude. Turn rough prompts into expert-grade ones.

plugins.name: prompt-enhancer
plugins.description: Rewrites any rough, vague, or weak prompt into a comprehensive, high-quality version that gets dramatically better results from any LLM.
